# datamark Documentation

- [API Doc Format](/docs/examples/api-docs-format): Parse endpoint documentation with parameters and responses.
- [Basic Format](/docs/examples/basic-format): Define a simple format with parse and stringify.
- [Blog Post Format](/docs/examples/blog-post-format): Parse metadata and body content with typed frontmatter.
- [Changelog Format](/docs/examples/changelog-format): Parse a versioned changelog with release dates and bullet lists.
- [Examples](/docs/examples): undefined
- [Meeting Notes Format](/docs/examples/meeting-notes-format): Parse meeting notes with attendees, agenda, and tracked action items.
- [Recipe Format](/docs/examples/recipe-format): Parse a cooking recipe with typed frontmatter metadata, ingredients, and steps.
- [Todo List Format](/docs/examples/todo-list-format): Parse checkbox items with priorities.
- [The AST](/docs/explanation/ast): The fully typed abstract syntax tree that datamark produces from Markdown.
- [Explanation](/docs/explanation): undefined
- [Validation](/docs/explanation/validation): Standard Schema v1 support, validation errors, and typed frontmatter.
- [What is datamark?](/docs): A TypeScript library for parsing Markdown into typed objects and serializing them back using declarative formats.
- [Frontmatter](/docs/parse/frontmatter): Extract and split YAML frontmatter from Markdown strings.
- [Parse SDK](/docs/parse): undefined
- [parse()](/docs/parse/parse): Parse Markdown into a typed Document with a native section tree.
- [Tree Utilities](/docs/parse/tree-utils): Query, filter, split, and serialize the AST without writing raw loops.
- [YAML](/docs/parse/yaml): Parse and stringify YAML with datamark's built-in helpers.
- [Quickstart](/docs/quickstart): Get started with datamark in under 5 minutes. Parse your first Markdown document into a typed object.
- [Builder Primitives](/docs/stringify/builders): Type-safe functions for building Markdown strings block by block.
- [Document Serialization](/docs/stringify/document-serialization): Serialize AST nodes and full Documents back to Markdown.
- [Stringify SDK](/docs/stringify): undefined
- [datamark()](/docs/template/datamark-function): The format factory — create typed, self-testing formats from Markdown.
- [Frontmatter in Formats](/docs/template/frontmatter): Reading, validating, and typing frontmatter with the Format SDK.
- [Format SDK](/docs/template): undefined
- [Parsing Patterns](/docs/template/parsing): Navigate the AST, extract data, and map Markdown to typed objects.
- [Stringify & Markdown Primitives](/docs/template/stringify): Serialize typed data back to Markdown with builder functions from datamark/stringify.
- [Testing Formats](/docs/template/testing): Inline examples, self-testing formats, and CI integration.
